items.description: Absolute path to a file Codex modified.

summary.description: One paragraph: what changed and why. Must align with the approved plan step.

follow_ups.description: Anything Codex deferred and the captain should note — e.g., a domain rule candidate, a future cleanup, a deliberately-not-handled edge case.

tail.description: Last few lines of test output for the captain to inspect.

test_run.description: Optional: result of running the leadsman test post-edit. The captain re-runs independently regardless.

clarification_needed.description: Populated when the spec was too ambiguous to implement safely; files_changed should be empty in that case.
